'''Phoedris Bos''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nalrithian]] sympathizer who served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Early in his life, his eggmate [[Cypher Bos]] killed his weaker siblings but avoided Phoedris because he was stronger then the others. He was killed by Cypher on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] who then proceeded to use Phoedris' identity as a cover during his bounty hunting work.

{{Char-stub}}
